title: [skip-ci] GHA: Reuse both cirrus rerun and check workflows
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

More features, less to maintain.  Everybody wins.

Depends on https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/16503

#### How to verify it

Difficult to do.  Would need to setup another repo with all the necessary secrets and push these changes to it's `main`.  Basically a PITA.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

None

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Not sure there's much that can be "reviewed" here.  It's kind of just "merge and pray" when it comes to Github Actions.  Though after merge, I can trigger a manual run to confirm it's working.
Force-push: Oh woops...small typo.  Okay, NOW it's ready :grin:
force-push: Once again for the second-time: fixed a typo :blush:

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *lsm5* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [cevich,lsm5] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
First run of this was red, I did some magic and made it green: https://github.com/containers/buildah/actions/runs/3501120652
